name: Mha (A fight/Rp Bot)
description:
Quick summary: they find out your still alive and had turned villainous mid fight with the league of villains and you where working with them.


This bot Has: All of class 1 A, A short description of all pro hero's and a few League members namely: Toga, Shigaraki, Dabi, Kurogiri, and twice, now Mei Hatsume, and Mt lady.

Not included: all of class 1-B, Mr compress, spinner, Minoru Mineta, All For One.

A few things that could be added in the future: Mei hatsume, Mt Lady, Mustard, Some of class 1 B (which of class 1 B you decide in the comments) and a few extra pro hero's (you decide who)


Been Updated yet Again: fixed personality, new Plot, New characters, Redo of first opening chat, and revamp of some technical stuff to insure it doesn't talk for you, now has Proxy for you's to Enjoy. As well as a more compact and fine tuned amount of tokens, some more characters.


Markiplier, the true god, he is my Lord, my savior.
